Metadata.layoutDescription: Guide for RfC alliance members: create your own Last Z Survival Shooter hero character card with ChatGPT.
Metadata.heroTitle: Hero Character (From Image) — RfC Hero Forge
Metadata.heroDescription: Turn a photo into a Last Z hero card with ChatGPT in four steps.
Metadata.uniqueTitle: Hero Character (Without Image) — RfC Hero Forge
Metadata.uniqueDescription: No photo needed: describe your hero character in text and build the card with ChatGPT.
Metadata.customDescription: Make any kind of hero image — like a group scene — with ChatGPT's help writing the prompt.
Metadata.galleryDescription: Hero character cards created for RFC alliance members.

Footer.worksWith: Works with the ChatGPT app or chatgpt.com

Home.title: Make your own <gold>Last Z</gold> hero card
Home.subtitle: Copy a few reference images, fill in a prompt, paste it all into ChatGPT. Two minutes, no skills needed.
Home.pickPathSub: Three ways to forge an image — each page walks you through it.
Home.pathHeroText: Turn yourself — or anyone — into a hero card with your name on it.
Home.pathUniqueText: No photo needed — describe your hero and ChatGPT invents them.
Home.pathCustomText: Make any kind of hero image you want — group shots, events, themes.
Home.wallSub: Heroes forged by RfC so far. Tap any image to copy it — great as style references.

HeroPage.title: <gold>Hero Character</gold> (From Image)
HeroPage.intro: Turn a photo into a Last Z hero card with your name on it. You’ll paste 1 image + 1 prompt into ChatGPT — everything you need is on this page.

UniquePage.title: <gold>Hero Character</gold> (Without Image)
UniquePage.intro: No photo needed — describe a hero and ChatGPT invents them. You’ll paste 1 image + 1 prompt into ChatGPT.

CustomPage.title: <gold>Custom Image</gold>
CustomPage.intro: Group shots, parties, events — anything. Describe your idea and paste one prompt into ChatGPT with your images — it generates and runs the full image prompt itself.

GalleryPage.title: Alliance heroes
GalleryPage.intro: Cards created for RFC members with this workflow. Tap any card to view it full size.

shared.copyBlockedToast: Copy blocked here — press & hold (or right-click) the image to copy/save it
shared.copyFailedToast: Copy failed — select the text and copy manually
shared.scrollHint: Scroll for more → · Copy blocked? Press & hold the image.

hero.doneToast: All set — ChatGPT is forging your hero (1–2 min)
hero.step1Body: Tap a card to place it in slot 1. Rank & colors come in step 4 — any card works.
hero.step2Body: Tap an image to place it in slot 2. It only shows the art style — anyone works.
hero.step3Body: Upload a photo of the person or character you’re transforming — it fills slot 3. Clear, well-lit shots work best.
hero.photoTip: One clear photo is enough. Pets, avatars, and characters work too.
hero.step4Body: Fill in the details, then send the prompt to ChatGPT and paste the images into the same chat.
hero.howIntro: We give ChatGPT clear instructions + reference images to turn your person/character into a hero character.
hero.howStep2: Provide a hero image (for style accuracy).
hero.howStep3: Provide an image of YOUR person/character.
hero.howStep4: Fill out the details and send the prompt + images to ChatGPT.
hero.howResult: Result = a hero card in the same style & format as the game’s heroes.
hero.exampleMessage: Use the 3 attached images as references: Image 1 = the base card, Image 2 = the style, Image 3 = the person to transform… <note>(your prompt)</note>
hero.exampleCaption: ChatGPT — your finished hero card (1–2 min)
hero.imagesToast: Images copied as one sheet — paste it into your ChatGPT chat
hero.imagesDownloadedToast: Images downloaded as one sheet — attach it in your ChatGPT chat

unique.doneToast: All set — ChatGPT is forging your hero (1–2 min)
unique.step1Body: Tap a card to place it in slot 1. Rank & colors come in step 3 — any card works.
unique.step2Body: Tap an image to place it in slot 2. It only shows the art style — anyone works.
unique.step3Body: Name & describe your hero (plus any card changes), pick a rank, then send the prompt to ChatGPT and paste the images into the same chat.
unique.detailsPlaceholder: e.g. cute and elegant, blonde hair, tight mythical dress. Change the “B” to “F”, change all blue elements to an earthy green, make her dress out of leaves and branches
unique.howIntro: We give ChatGPT clear instructions + reference images to invent a brand-new hero character — no photo needed.
unique.howStep3: Describe your hero (name, look, card changes) and send the prompt + images to ChatGPT.
unique.howResult: Result = an invented hero card in the same style & format as the game’s heroes.
unique.exampleMessage: Use the attached images as references: Image 1 = the base card, Images 2–3 = hero style examples. Invent a new hero from my description… <note>(your prompt)</note>
unique.exampleCaption: ChatGPT — your invented hero card (1–2 min)
unique.imagesToast: Images copied as one sheet — paste it into your ChatGPT chat
unique.imagesDownloadedToast: Images downloaded as one sheet — attach it in your ChatGPT chat

custom.doneToast: All set — enjoy your custom image!
custom.step1Body: Describe what you want to create, then copy the prompt and paste it into ChatGPT. The reference format is included automatically — ChatGPT generates and runs the full image prompt itself.
custom.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. Add the heroes from each attached image into the base image (Image 1) of SuperT throwing a diamond party, keeping everyone recognizable
custom.tipBody: Not perfect? Just reply with tweaks — e.g. “remove the UI elements and spread the heroes out evenly”.
custom.howIntro: ChatGPT generates the image prompt internally and runs it — one message total.
custom.howStep1: Describe what you want to create.
custom.howStep2: Copy the prompt and paste it into ChatGPT.
custom.howStep3: Attach your images and hit send.
custom.howStep4: Reply with tweaks until it’s perfect.
custom.howResult: Result = any custom hero image — group shots, parties, events.
custom.exampleMessage: Using the provided images and topic, internally generate a prompt and execute it… Topic: “Add these heroes to the diamond party”… <note>(your topic + reference prompt)</note>

Wall.copyBlockedToast: Copy blocked here — press & hold (or right-click) the image to copy/save it
